questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Restaurant Brands and/or Yum (including their KFC and Pizza Hut restaurants) compete closely with Taco Bell and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Restaurant Brands, Yum or Taco Bell restaurants.
